assertions.description: INCORRECT: The gea-interface-board repo splits gerbers into two directories: drill/ (Excellon drill files only) and plots/ (all Gerber layers). When analyzing drill/ in isolation, the analyzer correctly finds 0 Gerber files but reports missing_required=['B.Cu','B.Mask','Edge.Cuts','F.Cu','F.Mask'] and complete=false. This is technically accurate for the drill/ subdirectory alone, but misleading at the project level since the full fabrication package is present across both directories. The plots/adapter gerber correctly reports complete=true with all 9 layers found.
